implementation_pattern: Pre-LLM risk scoring plus injection classifier plus hard blocklist
CI red-team suite for retrieved webpage and document prompts
Curated attack corpus with archived and active examples
Subject resource action condition policy check before tool call
Policy allow plus runtime risk allow for command or write or external-call tools
Zanzibar style relation tuples for tenant and workspace and asset permissions
Isolated runtime with restricted network FS and ephemeral credentials
Schema and policy validation for executable outputs
Pre-delivery scanning and masking for keys tokens PII
Static and dependency and image vulnerability scanning before apply/deploy
Fixed benchmark runs per model or prompt release
OTel semantic conventions for input decision tool and output events
Correlate model version prompt version policy version and tool action id
Detect anomalous process and syscall patterns in agent sandboxes
Generate and persist SBOM for each releasable artifact
Block deployment of unsigned or unverified artifacts
Require provenance attestations tied to build and source metadata
Map internal controls to OWASP LLM and MITRE ATLAS and EU AI Act
